title: BEM-867 route smoke verify
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/codex/proofs']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:13 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem866_verify_claude_action_smoke_result.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='claude_code_action_response_present':
    status='route_classify_smoke_response'
    next_action='classify Claude Code Action smoke response as APPROVED or BLOCKED'
elif ps=='smoke_runtime_seen_no_response':
    status='route_patch_response_writer'
    next_action='patch prompt/commit path so smoke writes response file'
elif ps=='dispatch_result_seen_no_smoke_runtime':
    status='route_parse_dispatch_result'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and patch exact workflow dispatch failure or target workflow issue'
else:
    status='route_repair_dispatch_queue_or_target'
    next_action='inspect dispatch queue processor, queue remainder, and smoke workflow target'
state={'bem':'BEM-867','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem867_route_after_claude_action_smoke_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem867_route_after_claude_action_smoke_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-867 | Route After Claude Action Smoke Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem867_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Continue Claude Code Action track until result.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-867'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem867_route_after_claude_action_smoke_verify','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem867_route_after_claude_action_smoke_verify.txt').write_text('BEM-867 '+status+' previous='+ps+'\n')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem867_route_after_claude_action_smoke_verify.json','governance/reports/bem867_route_after_claude_action_smoke_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem867_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl','governance/codex/proofs/bem867_route_after_claude_action_smoke_verify.txt'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-866 Claude Code Action smoke verification')
